tool_input.description: Read sections for REST validation error handling

tool_input.command:
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname scripts/read-sections.sh)" && pwd)"
SKILL_DIR="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
KNOWLEDGE_DIR="$SKILL_DIR/knowledge"
echo "SCRIPT_DIR=$SCRIPT_DIR"
echo "SKILL_DIR=$SKILL_DIR"
echo "KNOWLEDGE_DIR=$KNOWLEDGE_DIR"
ls "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/processing-pattern/restful-web-service/" | head -5
